## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you're facing or the manufacturing workflow that would benefit from this feature.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g., how other ERP systems handle this).
